description:
Add Close/Exit Buttons for Mobile Hamburger Menu and Image Galleries

Implement missing close/exit buttons to improve navigation and user experience on mobile devices and within image galleries.

Requirements:
- Add a visible close button (X icon) to the mobile hamburger menu
- Position the close button in a consistent, easily accessible location (typically top-right corner)
- Add a close button to image gallery views/modals
- Ensure close buttons are touch-friendly with adequate tap target size (minimum 44x44px)
- Implement proper click/tap handlers that close the respective components
- Add appropriate ARIA labels for accessibility (aria-label="Close menu" / "Close gallery")
- Consider adding escape key handler for desktop users
- Ensure close actions properly restore focus to the triggering element
- Test that closing resets any scroll locks or body overflow styles
- Verify close buttons are visible against all background colors/images

Edge Cases:
- Test behavior when user navigates between gallery images before closing
- Ensure menu close button doesn't conflict with other header elements on various screen sizes
- Verify proper z-index layering so close buttons appear above content
title: Add close buttons to mobile menu and image galleries
